releases.title: Ṣalāh Tracker
added: Fixed Sync issue with dua & salah data
Added few more duas to the list
improved: Sync now covers both adhkār and salah data

releases.title: Ṣalāh Tracker
added: Full Ṣalāh tracker — track all 5 daily prayers with Prayed, Jamā'ah, Delayed, and Missed statuses
Accurate prayer times using GPS or manual city selection (22 cities worldwide)
Sunnah prayer tracking — 6 Sunnah prayers with rakat counts
Tahajjud tracker with last-third-of-night time based on your location
Nafl prayer tracking — Ishraq, Duha, and Awwābīn
Prayer insights dashboard with weekly bar chart and intelligent insights
16-week salah completion heatmap
Nearby masjid finder using OpenStreetMap — no API key needed
Cross-device sync for salah logs when signed in
Bottom navigation bar to switch between Adhkār and Ṣalāh
improved: Sync now covers both adhkār and salah data

releases.title: Push Notifications & Cross-Device Sync
added: Background push notifications — reminders arrive even when app is closed
Cross-device sync via Supabase — check a dua on mobile, see it on desktop
Google sign-in support
Streak heatmap — 16-week GitHub-style completion calendar
Custom duas — add your own supplications with full Arabic support
Missed day recovery — mark past days as complete
improved: Notification reminders now use server-side push
Sound feedback on check, uncheck, and full completion
User avatar with sync status indicator

releases.title: PWA & Offline Support
added: Installable as a PWA — add to home screen on iOS and Android
Full offline support via Service Worker
Dark and light mode with persisted preference
7-day history bar chart
Priority filter (★) for essential duas
improved: Arabic typography using Noto Naskh Arabic
Faster load times with cached assets

releases.title: Initial Release
added: 14 curated duas with Arabic, English, and transliteration
Daily completion tracking with streaks
Morning, Evening, After Ṣalāh, and Anytime session filters
Search and category filters
Progress saved locally to device
